title: Time or random value in JSX
message: This can cause a hydration mismatch because Date.now() reached from JSX gives a different value on the server than in the browser. Move it into useEffect+useState to run only in the browser, or add suppressHydrationWarning to the parent if it's on purpose.
help: Move time or random values into useEffect+useState so they only run in the browser, or add suppressHydrationWarning to the parent if it's intentional
